TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Squliq, title = Squliq, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Squliq} }

S.FORM: squliq squliq hya' ga pinbcyan na minqyanux babaw uraw qaniy, qaniy hya' ga sinbcyan sa lamu' na ini' ptnaq na minqyanux, nanu' kwara' qu squliq ru qqsinuw, ru qqbhniq, ru qlqulih, ru kwara' ka kaykuwi'. nma' ta' baqun maha squliq hya' ga maki' sqaniy qu sinqaysan na gluw qaniy hya' ga, kya qutux luhay kkayal na bnkis sraral ga, mutuw kmayal maha "ita' squliq hya' ga, ini' ptnaq sa qsinuw giy ini' ta' pinhmut mqyanux ita', qsinuw hya' hya ungat sayux naha' laha, ungat gaga' na qsinuw hya." qutux kkayal hya' sun maha squliq qaniy hya' ga, ini' pgluw qu ginlhuyan ga squloiq sawn naha', niwan maha iyat ta' gluw maha qu kay' qasa hya'. skahul ta' squw sinbcyan na ubuy gluw na squliq lmpuw lga, maki' kya quw sawn naha' 'tayal ru Baybuzyuq ru Bunun. itan ga balay balay na squliq.

squliq squliq hya' ga pinbcyan na minqyanux babaw uraw qaniy, qaniy hya' ga sinbcyan sa lamu' na ini' ptnaq na minqyanux, nanu' kwara' qu squliq ru qqsinuw, ru qqbhniq, ru qlqulih, ru kwara' ka kaykuwi'. nma' ta' baqun maha squliq hya' ga maki' sqaniy qu sinqaysan na gluw qaniy hya' ga, kya qutux luhay kkayal na bnkis sraral ga, mutuw kmayal maha "ita' squliq hya' ga, ini' ptnaq sa qsinuw giy ini' ta' pinhmut mqyanux ita', qsinuw hya' hya ungat sayux naha' laha, ungat gaga' na qsinuw hya." qutux kkayal hya' sun maha squliq qaniy hya' ga, ini' pgluw qu ginlhuyan ga squloiq sawn naha', niwan maha iyat ta' gluw maha qu kay' qasa hya'. skahul ta' squw sinbcyan na ubuy gluw na squliq lmpuw lga, maki' kya quw sawn naha' 'tayal ru Baybuzyuq ru Bunun. itan ga balay balay na squliq.
S.PHON: s~ɕquliq s~ɕquliq ħjaʔ ɣa pinβʦ~ʨjan na minqjanux βaβaw uraw qanij, qanij ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕinβʦ~ʨjan s~ɕa lamuʔ na iniʔ ptnaq na minqjanux, nanuʔ kwaraʔ qu s~ɕquliq ru qqs~ɕinuw, ru qqβħniq, ru qlquliħ, ru kwaraʔ ka kajkuwiʔ. nmaʔ taʔ βaqun maħa s~ɕquliq ħjaʔ ɣa makiʔ s~ɕqanij qu s~ɕinqajs~ɕan na ɣluw qanij ħjaʔ ɣa, kja qutux luħaj kkajal na βnkis~ɕ s~ɕraral ɣa, mutuw kmajal maħa "itaʔ s~ɕquliq ħjaʔ ɣa, iniʔ ptnaq s~ɕa qs~ɕinuw ɣij iniʔ taʔ pinħmut mqjanux itaʔ, qs~ɕinuw ħjaʔ ħja uŋat s~ɕajux naħaʔ laħa, uŋat ɣaɣaʔ na qs~ɕinuw ħja." qutux kkajal ħjaʔ s~ɕun maħa s~ɕquliq qanij ħjaʔ ɣa, iniʔ pɣluw qu ɣinlħujan ɣa s~ɕquloiq s~ɕawn naħaʔ, niwan maħa ijat taʔ ɣluw maħa qu kajʔ qas~ɕa ħjaʔ. s~ɕkaħul taʔ s~ɕquw s~ɕinβʦ~ʨjan na uβuj ɣluw na s~ɕquliq lmpuw lɣa, makiʔ kja quw s~ɕawn naħaʔ ʔtajal ru βajβuzjuq ru βunun. itan ɣa βalaj βalaj na s~ɕquliq.
